ddls:
CREATE TABLE "features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the feature */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the feature */,
  "jira_ticket" TEXT /* Corresponding JIRA ticket ID */,
  "owner" TEXT /* User or team responsible for the feature */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the feature */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the feature */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Expected completion date */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the feature was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the feature was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "steps" (
  "step_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each step */,
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* ID of the feature this step belongs to */,
  "step_description" TEXT /* Description of the step to be followed */,
  "expected_result" TEXT /* Expected result after following the step */,
  "sequence" INTEGER /* Order in which the steps should be followed */,
  "assigned_to" TEXT /* User or team responsible for the step */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the step */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Expected completion date for the step */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the step was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the step was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("step_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_steps_feature_id FOREIGN KEY ("feature_id") REFERENCES features ("feature_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "step_id" INTEGER /* ID of the step this result belongs to */,
  "actual_result" TEXT /* Actual result obtained after following the step */,
  "result_date" TEXT /* Date when the result was recorded */,
  "assigned_to" TEXT /* User or team who recorded the result */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the result */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the result */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the result was recorded */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the result was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_step_id FOREIGN KEY ("step_id") REFERENCES steps ("step_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "issues" (
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each issue */,
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* ID of the feature this issue is related to */,
  "step_id" INTEGER /* ID of the step this issue is related to */,
  "issue_description" TEXT /* Description of the issue */,
  "issue_type" TEXT /* Type of issue (e.g., bug, UI inconsistency) */,
  "owner" TEXT /* User or team responsible for resolving the issue */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the issue */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the issue */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Expected resolution date */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the issue was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the issue was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("issue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_step_id FOREIGN KEY ("step_id") REFERENCES steps ("step_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_feature_id FOREIGN KEY ("feature_id") REFERENCES features ("feature_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "jira_tickets" (
  "jira_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each JIRA ticket */,
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* ID of the feature this ticket is associated with */,
  "ticket_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the JIRA ticket */,
  "ticket_status" TEXT /* Current status of the JIRA ticket */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the JIRA ticket was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the JIRA ticket was last updated */,
  "owner" TEXT /* User or team responsible for the JIRA ticket */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the JIRA ticket */,
  "assignee" TEXT /* User or team assigned to the JIRA ticket */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Expected completion date for the JIRA ticket */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("jira_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_jira_tickets_feature_id FOREIGN KEY ("feature_id") REFERENCES features ("feature_id")
)
